name: Cardboard Wars
short_description: Cardboard Wars Join a world covered in office supplies, arts and crafts material and a lot of cardboard – where you could find colourful surprises behind every corner. Experience exiting skirmishes in this completely new version!.[/b]
detailed_description:
Join us in a world covered in office supplies, arts and crafts material and a lot of cardboard – where you could find colourful surprises behind every corner. Experience exiting skirmishes in this completely new version!

Cardboard Wars is a 1st person cartoon shooter in an imaginary Cardboard Universe. Match up with others online for funny multiplayer competition.
Enjoy a huge battle in each environmentally unique map.
Every Gamemode are fully Bot supported.
Since Cardboard Wars is a multiplayer game we strive to always keep it fresh by adding new game modes and having more Levels for you to reach. Focus of the game is a fast and funny shooter game like what most of us played back in the 90s on many LAN party's.
Customize the looks of your character and jump into battle!



- Host own Server (Up to 10 Players)
- Character customization
- Invite your friends
- User and performance friendly game


CBW has released a playable alpha version in early access on Steam in Summer 2018.
The basics of the game are implemented and will be improved, based on player feedback.
New Maps and Gamemodes will be released in the future.

Please Note, this is Early Access – Alpha Version ,
accept unfinished parts and bugs.
Please be polite with your comments. Game is under Development
